cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude

cards.name: 8 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: stagnation, monotony, accepting less, avoidance, fear of change, staying in bad situation

cards.name: ⅩⅩⅠ The World
cards.interpretation: completion, achievement, fulfilment, sense of belonging, wholeness, harmony
